goal: Implement 'gad assets upload' and 'gad assets download' — the two highest-value placeholder subcommands left from 71-01 scaffold. Defer move+transfer to a future task. upload: reads a local file, computes SHA-256 content hash + sanitized slug, uploads via @supabase/supabase-js Storage client to bucket 'project-assets-<project_id>' (lazy-create via the create_project_bucket() RPC if missing), writes a new row to assets table (project_id, species_id?, generation_id?, bucket_name, storage_path, mime_type, size_bytes, labels[]). download: reads asset metadata by id, generates a signed URL (60s for UI / 3600s if --cli flag), streams object to --out path (default: ./<asset_slug>). Tests: mock supabase client + storage, verify slug generation, bucket creation call, metadata row insert, error on missing env. DOES NOT implement move/transfer — that's 71-04.
